problem_text_cn: 1076 半径$R$、质量$m$的匀质球壳，初始以角速度$\omega_0$绕水平直径轴旋转，无初速轻放在水平地面上，球壳与地面摩擦因数为$\mu$。求：（1）球壳达到纯滚状态的时刻$t_0$；（2）$0\leqslant t < t_0$时刻瞬心$M$的位置及加速度$\boldsymbol{a}_M$。
problem_text_en: 1076 A uniform spherical shell of radius $R$ and mass $m$ initially rotates around a horizontal diameter axis with an angular velocity $\omega_0$, and is gently placed on a horizontal ground with no initial velocity. The friction coefficient between the spherical shell and the ground is $\mu$. Find: (1) The time $t_0$ when the spherical shell reaches the pure rolling state; (2) The position and acceleration $\boldsymbol{a}_M$ of the instantaneous center $M$ at $0\leqslant t < t_0$.
img_cn: 图1076_1：球壳滑动摩擦阶段的受力与运动分析
img_en: Fig. 1076_1: Force and motion analysis of the spherical shell in the sliding friction stage
problem_solution_cn: 【核心思路】1. 纯滚条件：$v_C = \omega R$，结合牛顿第二定律与转动定律，求解质心加速度$a_C$和角加速度$\beta$，联立得到纯滚时刻$t_0$；2. 瞬心位置：由$v_C = \omega r$确定球心下方的距离$r$；瞬心加速度：分解为相对质心的向心、切向加速度与质心加速度的矢量和。
problem_solution_en: 【Core Idea】1. Pure rolling condition: $v_C = \omega R$. Combine Newton's second law and the rotational equation of motion to solve for the centroid acceleration $a_C$ and angular acceleration $\beta$, and obtain the pure rolling time $t_0$ simultaneously; 2. Instantaneous center position: Determine the distance $r$ below the center of mass by $v_C = \omega r$; Instantaneous center acceleration: Decompose into the vector sum of the centripetal, tangential acceleration relative to the center of mass and the centroid acceleration.
problem_answer: （1）纯滚时刻$\boldsymbol{t_0 = \dfrac{2\omega_0 R}{5\mu g}}$；（2）瞬心位置：球心C下方$\boldsymbol{r = \dfrac{2R\mu g t}{2\omega_0 R - 3\mu g t}}$处；瞬心加速度：水平分量$\boldsymbol{a_{M//} = \dfrac{2\omega_0 R}{2\omega_0 R - 3\mu g t}\mu g}$（向右），竖直分量$\boldsymbol{a_{M\perp} = \dfrac{(2\omega_0 R - 3\mu g t)\mu g t}{2R}}$（向上）
